```python
---
title: "My Interactive Map"
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import folium

# Create the map centered at a specific location
m = folium.Map(location=[40.7484, -73.9857], zoom_start=15)

# Add a marker with a popup
folium.Marker(
    [40.7484, -73.9857], 
    popup="<b>Empire State Building</b><br>Clickable text here!",
    tooltip="Click me!"
).add_to(m)

m
